name: Plum Torte KH
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Add flour, baking powder, eggs to the mixture and beat well.
3. Pour batter into a 9-inch springform pan.
4. Arrange plum halves on top of the batter with the skin side up.
5. Sprinkle lightly with additional sugar and lemon juice.
6. Sprinkle with about 1 tsp cinnamon and a small amount of nutmeg.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until the batter has risen and covered the plums.
8. Remove from oven and allow to cool completely before serving, refrigerating, or freezing if desired.
9. To serve frozen tortes, defrost and reheat briefly at 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
(Note: This recipe is taken from "Kitchen with a View" by Judi Burke, "The Keeper's House" at Robinson Point Light on Isle au Haut, ME 04645.)
